subcodes.first_line: The purpose underlying the endurance of every affliction, the bearing of all tribulations, the sacrifice of life itself, and the shedding of the blood of countless blessed souls [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: مقصود از تحمّل جمیع صدمات و حمل بلیّات و انفاق جان و ریختن خون هزاران نفوس مبارکه
subcodes.subjects: @unity; oneness of humanity, @suffering and imprisonment, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @House of Justice, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @equality of men and women
